footer.local: Local-first — local or user-owned AI engines

char.title: Characters
char.sub: Create a character assisted by your LLM, then generate their portrait with ComfyUI.
char.brief_label: Describe the idea in a few words
char.brief_placeholder: Briefly describe the character, their role and tone…
char.config_label: Physical configurator (optional — imposed on character and avatar)

form.moral_limits_label: Moral limits (reactions, avoided topics — one per line)
form.moral_limits_placeholder: Describe topics, behaviors or limits to avoid…
form.image_prompt_label: Image prompt (natural English description for FLUX klein)
form.locked_tags_label: Locked physical traits (always imposed on each image)
form.locked_tags_placeholder: e.g. adult character, short hair, blue eyes
form.new_title: Reset the form to create a new character
form.krea_force_physical_label: Force physical base description in Krea 2 prompts
form.krea_token_label: Krea 2 identity token (character LoRA trigger word)

voice.title: Voice
voice.hint: Import a clean 6-20 second audio sample with one speaker and little background noise. The voice is used locally to make this character speak.
voice.save_first_hint: Save the character first to import a voice sample.
voice.transcript_placeholder: Write the exact words spoken in the sample.
voice.transcript_hint: Used only by Qwen3-TTS to improve fidelity. Chatterbox does not need it.

emotions.title: Emotion Portraits
emotions.hint: Generate one portrait per emotion from the main avatar. They appear dynamically in conversations based on calculated mood.

memory.title: Character Memory
memory.short_hint: Mood (affection, energy, etc.) is calculated automatically and visible in conversation — not here.
memory.add_placeholder: Add a memory or fact to remember…
memory.compacted: Short-term memory summarized into long-term memory.
memory.save_first_hint: Save the character first to add memories.

char.export_btn: Export share package (profile + avatar + mood faces)

toasts.name_required: Please provide at least a name.
toasts.sheet_ready: Character sheet ready — adjust it, then save.
toasts.form_reset: Form reset — ready for a new character.

config.preview_hint: Previews adapt to the selected gender. “Generate” creates the image through ComfyUI; “Choose” selects the option.

preview.all_exist: All previews already exist for this gender.

char.reset_confirm:
Reset this form?

Unsaved changes will be lost.
The current character and their conversations will not be deleted.
char.delete_confirm: Delete this character? Their conversations will also be deleted.

prompt_utils.hint: Click a language or style to append a persistent instruction to the character role prompt.
prompt_utils.title: Writing helpers

char.share_hint: Public package: conversations, personal memories, voice and settings are never included.

visual_style.title: Choose a visual creator
visual_style.hint: Each creator keeps its own draft and its own preview library.
visual_style.anime_desc: Anime prompts and a separate anime preview library.
visual_style.cartoon_desc: Cartoon prompts and a separate cartoon preview library.

chat.title: Chats

toasts.all_members_added: All your characters are already in this conversation.

chat.scenario_title: Activate a scenario in this conversation
chat.tts_on_title: Voice enabled for this conversation — click to mute it
chat.tts_off_title: Voice muted for this conversation — click to enable it
chat.send_without_message_title: Makes the selected character react without a new message from you
chat.continue_title: Continue this message without repeating it
chat.illustrate_title: Illustrate the scene with an image
chat.background_title: Generate a background (T2I scenery, usable as a fourth reference in a group scene)
chat.group_persona_title: Scene including your persona as a second reference
chat.group_scene_title: Scene bringing together the active characters
chat.regen_text_confirm: Regenerate this message’s text? The current text will be replaced.
chat.background_generated_title: Background generated — you can use it as a fourth reference in a group scene
chat.background_generated_note: 🌆 background — usable as a fourth group reference
chat.new_modal_hint: Select one character for a duo, or several for a group chat.
chat.include_persona_title: Illustrate with you included (your persona as a second reference)
chat.bring_scene_title: Bring this scene to life with your persona when relevant
chat.character_only_title: Illustrate only the character, with no user persona or secondary actor
chat.tts_disabled_title: Enable text-to-speech in Settings to listen to this message
chat.tts_disabled_hint: Text-to-speech is disabled. Enable it in Settings > Voice, then save the section.

scenario.title: Scenario Creator
scenario.sub: Create narrative contexts you can activate in any conversation.
scenario.conflict_placeholder: e.g. A misunderstanding complicates the situation
scenario.notes_placeholder: Add useful context, atmosphere or constraints…
scenario.share_hint: Shared scenario packages contain narrative data only.

journal.title: Journal · Timeline
journal.sub: The memory of your shared story: highlights, firsts, saved images.
journal.generate_btn_title: Generate a moment from recent conversations

toasts.select_character: Choose a character to generate a moment.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.sub: All generated images, by your characters.

studio.title: Image Studio
studio.sub: Choose a model family, a workflow, and the required components — the app checks compatibility before generating.
studio.refs_hint: This workflow needs starting image(s) — import them here before generating.
studio.prompt_placeholder: e.g. character in a quiet room, soft natural light

unet.gguf_saved_hint: GGUF UNet saved. Enable GGUF mode in Settings to use it.
unet.st_saved_hint: Safetensors UNet saved. Enable Safetensors mode in Settings to use it.

library.title: Model Library
library.sub: Watched folders and detected models. No automatic scan: add a folder then refresh.
library.search_placeholder: Search for a folder or model…

toasts.folder_added_scan: Folder added. Run a scan to detect models.

lora.title: LoRA Manager
lora.sub: Manage your active LoRA stack, local library and Civitai connections. Workflows and Image Studio are never affected by this page.
lora.analyze_dup_btn_title: Compute SHA256 hashes and detect identical files
lora.active_hint: LoRAs listed here are injected into each image generation (if 'always active') or when their trigger word appears in a prompt. The stack never touches Image Studio directly.
lora.add_manual_summary: ＋ Add a LoRA manually to the stack
lora.lib_hint: LoRAs detected in your model folders. Declare your folders in Library → Watched folders then scan.
lora.presets_hint: A preset is a snapshot of the active stack. Recall it in one click to restore a complete configuration.
lora.civitai_hint: The token is only used to enrich your local LoRAs with their Civitai metadata and official previews. It is never sent to the frontend after saving, never written to logs, never included in exports. All Civitai calls go through the local server.
lora.token_hint: Generate your token at civitai.com/user/account → API Keys. Paste it here then save.
lora.sync_hint: AmiorAI computes the hash of each LoRA file, queries Civitai by hash, then caches the metadata and official previews. The hash is only recalculated if the file has changed.

toasts.empty_stack: The active stack is empty — nothing to save.

civitai.profile_found: Profile found — review it before confirming.

lora.compat_unknown: Compatibility: cannot be verified — unknown family.
lora.token_missing: No token saved. Paste your Civitai token above.

duplicates.none_for_file: No duplicate found for this file.

system.title: System
system.sub: Engine status and local API connections. Check here if something is unavailable.
system.comfy_status_offline: offline — start ComfyUI from its own launcher
system.comfy_hint: ComfyUI is a separately installed third-party application. Start, stop or restart it from its own launcher. AmiorAI can only request model unloading through the local API.
system.llm_hint: Loading can take time (large model). The timer and last log line confirm it's progressing and not frozen.
system.lan_hint: Allows opening AmiorAI from a phone or tablet on the same Wi-Fi network.
system.lan_warning: Does not create Internet access. Does not configure your router or firewall.
system.lan_code_hint: This code will not be shown after page reload. Write it down.
system.lan_restart_note: ↺ Restart AmiorAI to apply this change.
system.lan_footer1: Accessible only on your local network.
system.lan_footer2: Do not open a port on your Internet router.
system.lan_footer3: Shares the same database, characters and settings as this PC.

lan.new_code_confirm: Generating a new code will invalidate all existing LAN sessions. Continue?
lan.new_code_done: New code generated. Write it down — it will not be shown again.
lan.sessions_revoked: All LAN devices have been disconnected.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sub: Choose local engines or connect services you own. Companion data stays local; remote providers receive only requests sent to them.
settings.appearance_hint: Choose the appearance of {appName}. 'System' follows Windows light/dark setting and changes automatically.
settings.lang_hint: Sets the interface language and the language used for character generation.
settings.persona_hint: Your identity in the roleplay. Injected into each conversation so characters know you. Your image can serve as reference in group scenes.
settings.persona_desc_label: Description (who you are, your role, your appearance if you want to appear in images)
settings.persona_desc_placeholder: e.g. adult, calm temperament, casual style…
settings.llm_backend_hint: AmiorAI uses LM Studio exclusively for the conversation and utility models.
settings.llm_context_hint1: This value must be equal to or lower than the context actually configured for the model on the selected provider.
settings.util_hint: Quality tip: a roleplay model (often uncensored) is poor at producing clean JSON and structured image prompts.
settings.util_disabled_opt: No — everything through the main model
settings.util_enabled_opt: Yes — structured tasks on a dedicated model
settings.util_fallback_label: Allow fallback to the conversational model if the utility is unavailable
settings.tts_hint: Makes characters speak locally from a clean 6–20 second voice sample.
settings.whisper_hint: Lets you speak instead of type, transcribed locally via Whisper (100% offline, nothing sent externally).
settings.comfy_hint: Choose a local or user-owned remote image engine. AmiorAI does not sell compute and does not manage provider billing.
settings.comfy_negative_label: Default negative prompt (leave blank for FLUX.2)
settings.flux2_hint: Sets how AmiorAI loads the Flux 2 Klein UNet for all normal generations.
settings.vram_swap_opt: Swap — one large model in VRAM at a time (recommended 12–16 GB)
settings.vram_coexist_opt: Coexist — keeps both loaded (large GPU only)
settings.vram_hint: In swap mode, the app frees the LLM while generating an image (and vice versa).
settings.advanced_prompts_hint: Modify the global system prompts used by AmiorAI.

advanced_prompts.keys_missing: ⚠ Missing JSON keys: {keys}. Image generations may fail.

settings.lmstudio_only_hint: AmiorAI uses LM Studio exclusively for the conversation and utility models.
settings.util_model_placeholder: Leave empty to reuse the conversation model
settings.util_same_server_hint: The utility model uses the same selected provider and credentials as the conversation model.
settings.tts_v40_hint: v40 uses Chatterbox Multilingual V3 by default. Qwen3-TTS 0.6B remains an isolated experimental option. XTTS and cloud voice services are neither installed nor used.
settings.tts_install_hint: Installation: run tts_server/install.bat for Chatterbox. Run tts_server/install_qwen.bat only to add the Qwen option. Model weights download on first start.
settings.tts_chatterbox_note: Recommended: natural, multilingual and easy to use. Suggested starting values: expressiveness 0.5, fidelity 0.5, variation 0.8.
settings.tts_qwen_note: Qwen3-TTS runs in a separate environment. An exact reference transcript greatly improves cloning; without one, AmiorAI automatically uses speaker-embedding mode.
settings.persona_krea_lora_hint: Used as Krea Character LoRA 2 for immersive “Bring this scene to life” images. Leave none to disable.
settings.tts_vram_offload_hint: Recommended on 16 GB GPUs: AmiorAI stops the CUDA voice engine before LM Studio or ComfyUI, then restarts it automatically for the next spoken reply.
settings.providers_privacy_hint: Local mode keeps prompts on this PC. Remote modes send only the data required for the selected task to the provider configured by the user.
settings.image_provider_hint: Choose local ComfyUI, a remote ComfyUI-compatible server, Runpod Serverless, or a user-owned Runpod Pod.
settings.runpod_hint: AmiorAI never sells compute or credits. This key controls only the Runpod account owned and billed directly to you.
settings.llm_local_start_hint: Start LM Studio, load a model, start its local server, then click Test above.
settings.secret_keep_placeholder: Leave blank to keep the saved key
settings.llm_serverless_hint: The endpoint starts a Flex worker on demand. Recommended setting: 0 minimum workers and a 900-second idle timeout.
settings.image_serverless_hint: Uses the AmiorAI ComfyUI format: workflow plus optional reference images. The endpoint starts on the first generation.
settings.image_resolution_hint: Applies to all generations except previews (fixed 512×512). Duo, Trio, and Group use their own workflow resolution.
settings.runpod_auto_stop_label: Automatically stop a Pod after inactivity
settings.runpod_auto_stop_hint: The countdown starts after the last completed request. Active text or image generation, upload, or download prevents automatic stop. A crash or power loss cannot guarantee the stop command; verify the Runpod dashboard.

dev.panel_hint: These tools allow managing the master translation file and synchronizing locale JSON files.

toasts.import_ok: Master file imported and JSON generated.

models.title: Models
models.sub: Checkpoints, UNet, VAE, CLIP detected in the Library — enriched with their Civitai profile.
models.wishlist_hint: Models added from Civitai whose file is not yet detected locally.
models.file_not_detected: Local file not detected yet. Run a scan again from Library.

diagnostic.title: AmiorAI Diagnostic
diagnostic.sub: Check the status of all components without modifying or generating anything.

details.utility_fallback: Not configured — the chat LLM is used as fallback
details.cache_folder_absent: Cache folder is missing (normal when no Civitai scan has run)
details.krea_workflow_valid: Unified workflow valid, including ResolutionSelector and two LoRA slots

workflow.gguf_loader_residual: Residual UnetLoaderGGUF node (it should not be present)
workflow.unet_points_to_gguf: unet_name points to a .gguf in node {node_id}

prompt.chargen_lang_directive:
Generation language: ENGLISH.
Write all fields in English: personality, character, scenario, greeting, physical description and associated suggestions.
Only the 'image_prompt' field must remain in English (required by the FLUX image model — which it already is).
prompt.review_hint: Edit the prompt sent to ComfyUI freely, then generate.

chat.select_character_first: Select a character in the 👤 tab before creating a conversation.
chat.select_character: Select a character to create a conversation.
chat.create_character_first: Create a character first in the 👤 tab.

studio.unavailable: Studio unavailable — ComfyUI cannot be reached or no model is configured.

image.global_engine_hint: This choice applies to avatars, character previews, chat images, emotions, groups, LoRA previews and Image Studio.
